The '''Tinoon Station Storage''' was a [[Cargo Facility 2]] located at [[Tinoon Station]]. The cargo facility became under [[Skirmish above Tinoon|attack]] by a pirate force consisting of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and a pair of [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvettes]] [[Wraith (pirates)|''Wraith'']]. The pirate attack was repelled by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] who was delivering a probe to [[Aeron Azzameen|his sister]] in the ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' and had decided to help, for repelling the attack Ace was allowed to go without inspection.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
